mapper.sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_no, c.customer_name, c.credit_code, c.customer_level, c.customer_source, c.industry, c.company_size, c.province, c.city, c.district, c.address, c.website, c.customer_status, c.first_contact_date, c.cooperation_date, c.total_amount, c.user_id, c.dept_id, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, u.nick_name as user_name, d.dept_name, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(t.tag_name SEPARATOR ',') FROM mk_customer_tag_rel r LEFT JOIN mk_customer_tag t ON r.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE r.customer_id = c.customer_id) as tag_names FROM mk_customer c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON c.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.select:
c.del_flag = '0' AND c.customer_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerNo}, '%') AND c.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
ORDER BY c.customer_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_customer (customer_no, customer_name, credit_code, customer_level, customer_source, industry, company_size, province, city, district, address, website, customer_status, first_contact_date, cooperation_date, total_amount, user_id, dept_id, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{customerNo}, #{customerName}, #{creditCode}, #{customerLevel}, #{customerSource}, #{industry}, #{companySize}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{address}, #{website}, #{customerStatus}, #{firstContactDate}, #{cooperationDate}, #{totalAmount}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_customer SET del_flag = '2' WHERE customer_id IN #{customerId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO mk_customer_tag_rel (customer_id, tag_id, create_time) VALUES
(#{customerId}, #{tagId}, sysdate())
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id FROM mk_customer_tag_rel WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_customer SET user_id = NULL, dept_id = NULL, update_time = sysdate() WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
UPDATE mk_customer SET user_id = #{userId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE customer_id IN #{customerId}
UPDATE mk_customer SET customer_status = #{customerStatus}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE customer_id IN #{customerId}
